name: cleaner-code
displayName: Cleaner Code — AI Code Security Scanner
description: Detects hidden malicious code patterns: invisible Unicode, Trojan Source (BiDi), homoglyphs, Glassworm steganography, Rules File Backdoor, typosquatting, obfuscation, and AI-powered deep analysis.
author: goldmembrane

tools.name: scan_file
tools.description: Scan a single file for hidden malicious code patterns

tools.name: scan_directory
tools.description: Recursively scan a directory for threats across all source files

tools.name: scan_rules_file
tools.description: Scan AI config files for prompt injection and Rules File Backdoor attacks

tools.name: check_dependencies
tools.description: Check package.json for typosquatting, suspicious install scripts, and dependency risks

tools.name: ai_analyze
tools.description: Deep AI analysis using CodeBERT model to classify code as malicious or benign

tools.name: explain_finding
tools.description: Get detailed explanation of a threat category with attack scenarios and remediation
